pages.text: A roomy hillside pen with a small flock of $(bold)sheep in assorted wool colours$() — renewable wool of every shade without hunting down dyes. The grass regrows as they graze, so shearing is endless.

$(bold)Wool, in colour$()$(br)Made from $(item)2 Wool$() and an $(item)Iron Ingot$() (for shears — mine a Rocky island) plus dirt. Breed the colours you want; the colours you got are the luck of the throw, with a rare chance of the elusive pink sheep.
